title: LineageMarks
description: Provenance tracking for artifacts per Control Law I2 (Counter-Marks). Every piece of propagated information must be accompanied by auxiliary context that serves as a boundary condition to validate its integrity.

source_id.description: Origin identity that created this artifact

parent_hash.description: Hash of the parent artifact (hash-linked ancestry)

lineage_path.description: Full ancestry chain of artifact hashes

timebox.description: Validity window in ISO8601 interval or duration format (e.g., 'PT1H', 'PT24H')

negation.description: If true, this is an antagonistic mark (counter-mark)

created_at.description: Timestamp when the lineage was established

finalized_at.description: Timestamp when the marked item was finalized/committed
